name: OpenAlex Literature Search
description: Query OpenAlex works search for literature triage and save structured JSON results.

name: Europe PMC Method Triage
description: Search Europe PMC and capture publication records suitable for method triage and corpus building.

name: Snakemake Toy Workflow Starter
description: Run a small local Snakemake workflow through the repo-managed prefix and inspect deterministic toy outputs.

name: Slurm Job Debug Template
description: Render, submit, and inspect a minimal sbatch smoke job with log and accounting capture.

name: Scanpy QC Starter
description: Run a minimal Scanpy QC pass and export AnnData artifacts from a toy count matrix.

name: Crossref Metadata Search
description: Search Crossref works metadata for DOI-oriented citation discovery.

name: RCSB PDB Search
description: Search the Protein Data Bank through the official RCSB Search API.

name: Ensembl Gene Lookup
description: Lookup an Ensembl gene record from a species and gene symbol.

name: NCBI PubMed Search
description: Search PubMed through NCBI E-utilities and return Entrez IDs.

name: ClinicalTrials.gov Study Search
description: Search live trial records through the ClinicalTrials.gov API v2.

name: RCSB PDB Entry Summary
description: Fetch structural metadata for a known PDB accession through the official RCSB data API.

name: Nextflow Hello Workflow
description: Run a self-contained Nextflow hello workflow through the repo-managed JVM toolchain, locally or on Slurm.
test_commands: python3 skills/reproducible-workflows/nextflow-hello-workflow/scripts/run_nextflow_hello.py --executor slurm --partition cpu --out-dir scratch/nextflow-hello-slurm/results --work-dir scratch/nextflow-hello-slurm/work --summary-out scratch/nextflow-hello-slurm/summary.json

name: nf-core Pipeline List
description: List and summarize available nf-core pipelines through the repo-managed tools install.

name: Reactome Event Summary
description: Fetch a concise summary for a known Reactome event or pathway stable ID.

name: NCBI Gene Search
description: Search NCBI Gene by symbol and organism and return compact Entrez Gene summaries.

name: Multi-Source Literature Brief
description: Query OpenAlex, Europe PMC, Crossref, and PubMed and return a normalized cross-source literature brief.

name: Reactome Identifiers Enrichment
description: Submit a short identifier list to Reactome Analysis Service and return compact pathway enrichment summaries.

name: EBI Proteins Entry Summary
description: Fetch a compact protein summary by accession from the official EBI Proteins API.

name: PRIDE Project Search
description: Search PRIDE Archive project metadata and summarize matching public proteomics datasets.

name: ChEMBL Molecule Search
description: Search ChEMBL molecules by keyword and return compact cheminformatics summaries.

name: CWL CommandLineTool Starter
description: Run a minimal local CWL CommandLineTool example through the repo-managed cwltool prefix and summarize outputs.

name: WDL Task Starter
description: Run a minimal local WDL greeting workflow through the repo-managed miniwdl and udocker prefix.

name: RDKit Molecular Descriptors
description: Compute a compact RDKit descriptor summary from one SMILES string through the repo-managed chemistry prefix.

name: OpenMM System Minimization
description: Run a deterministic OpenMM minimization on a tiny toy system and summarize the energy drop.

name: fgsea Pre-ranked Enrichment
description: Run deterministic local pre-ranked gene set enrichment analysis with fgsea from toy TSV inputs.

name: clusterProfiler Custom Enrichment
description: Run deterministic local over-representation enrichment with clusterProfiler and a toy TERM2GENE/TERM2NAME table.

name: ENCODE Experiment Search
description: Search public ENCODE experiments by assay or free-text term and return compact epigenomics metadata summaries.

name: BioSamples Sample Search
description: Search EBI BioSamples by free text and return compact public sample metadata summaries.

name: MetaboLights Study Search
description: Search MetaboLights studies and resolve compact accession-level metabolomics metadata summaries.

name: QuickGO Term Search
description: Search Gene Ontology terms through the official QuickGO API and return compact term summaries.

name: Psi4 Single-Point Energy
description: Run a deterministic Psi4 single-point energy on a tiny water system through the dedicated repo-managed prefix.

name: DeepChem Circular Featurization
description: Compute deterministic DeepChem circular fingerprints for one or more SMILES strings through the dedicated repo-managed prefix.

name: Scanpy Ranked Genes Starter
description: Run a deterministic toy Scanpy marker-ranking pass and summarize top genes per group.

name: scikit-image Otsu Segmentation Starter
description: Generate a toy microscopy-like image, segment it with Otsu thresholding, and summarize connected components.

name: Xarray Climate Cube Starter
description: Build a deterministic toy climate cube with Xarray and summarize spatiotemporal statistics.

name: Matminer Composition Featurization
description: Compute compact stoichiometry-style composition features for a short list of formulas with matminer.

name: GeoPandas Spatial Join Starter
description: Run a deterministic point-in-polygon join with GeoPandas, including reprojection and compact JSON summarization.

name: PyMC Bayesian Linear Regression Starter
description: Fit a small Bayesian linear regression with PyMC and summarize posterior means plus credible intervals.

name: Skill Registry Router Starter
description: Route a free-text scientific task query to candidate skills from the local registry using aliases, tags, and topic overlap.

name: Matplotlib Publication Plot Starter
description: Render a deterministic two-panel publication-style Matplotlib figure and a compact fit summary from toy measurements.

name: Registry Link Audit Starter
description: Audit selected registry resource URLs and summarize which entries are reachable with a dependency-light HTTP checker.

name: scikit-image Regionprops Feature Extraction
description: Generate a deterministic toy image, extract scikit-image regionprops measurements, and summarize per-object morphology and intensity features.

name: RDKit Molecule Standardization
description: Standardize a molecule with RDKit MolStandardize, including fragment cleanup, uncharging, and canonical tautomer selection.

name: ArviZ Posterior Diagnostics Starter
description: Build a deterministic toy posterior and summarize posterior diagnostics such as R-hat and effective sample size with ArviZ.

name: Plotly Interactive Report Starter
description: Render a deterministic Plotly HTML report and compact line-fit summary from a small toy measurement table.

name: pre-commit Regression Testing Starter
description: Create a tiny temporary repository, run local pre-commit hooks, and summarize the regression-test result in a deterministic way.

name: Matminer Property Regression Starter
description: Featurize toy compositions with matminer, fit a deterministic Ridge regressor, and summarize holdout predictions for materials-property modeling.

name: sourmash Signature Compare Starter
description: Compute deterministic MinHash sketches for two toy FASTA sequences with sourmash and summarize similarity plus containment.

name: Rasterio Windowed Raster Preprocessing Starter
description: Generate a toy GeoTIFF with Rasterio, extract a window, downsample it, and summarize deterministic remote-sensing preprocessing outputs.

name: DoWhy Average Treatment Effect Starter
description: Build a toy observational dataset, identify a backdoor estimand with DoWhy, estimate the average treatment effect, and summarize a placebo refutation.

name: PyDESeq2 Differential Expression Starter
description: Run a deterministic toy bulk RNA-seq differential-expression workflow with PyDESeq2 and summarize the top ranked genes.

name: Quarto Notebook Report Starter
description: Render a tiny Jupyter notebook to standalone HTML with Quarto and summarize the executed report output.

name: LangGraph Planning Execution Agent Starter
description: Plan a small multi-step scientific task with LangGraph and route each step to locally registered skills with deterministic evidence.
test_commands: slurm/envs/agents/bin/python skills/scientific-agents-and-automation/langgraph-planning-execution-agent-starter/scripts/run_langgraph_planning_agent.py --goal 'single-cell marker ranking with an interactive report' --out scratch/agents/planning_agent_summary.json

name: Lifelines Kaplan Meier Starter
description: Fit deterministic Kaplan-Meier survival curves for a toy cohort and export a compact summary plus optional PNG.

name: InterPro Entry Summary
description: Fetch a compact InterPro entry summary for a protein family or domain accession through the official API.

name: NetworkX Graph Construction Starter
description: Build a deterministic toy biological interaction graph with NetworkX and summarize centrality plus shortest-path structure.

name: Scanpy ComBat Batch Correction Starter
description: Run deterministic toy ComBat correction in Scanpy and quantify pre/post batch separation while preserving cell-type structure.

name: CELLxGENE Census Atlas Query Starter
description: Query the pinned CELLxGENE Census dataset catalog and summarize top atlas matches for a keyword.

name: Slurm Monitoring and Accounting Starter
description: Submit a tiny Slurm probe job, collect queue snapshots with squeue, and summarize final accounting plus efficiency details.

name: pysam SAM BAM Summary Starter
description: Read a toy SAM alignment file with pysam, summarize core alignment statistics, and optionally emit an indexed BAM artifact.

name: Scanpy Cell-Type Annotation Starter
description: Score marker-gene programs with Scanpy and assign deterministic toy cell-type labels.

name: Scanpy DPT Trajectory Starter
description: Compute a deterministic toy diffusion-pseudotime trajectory with Scanpy DPT.

name: Reactome Pathway Hierarchy Walk Starter
description: Traverse the Reactome hierarchy tree and summarize the ancestor path, direct children, and descendant count for a target stable ID.

name: Slurm Job Array Starter
description: Submit a tiny real Slurm job array, wait for terminal accounting, and summarize per-task outputs in JSON.

name: RDKit Scaffold Analysis Starter
description: Compute Bemis-Murcko scaffold and generic-scaffold groupings for a small curated molecule set with RDKit.

name: Pymatgen Crystal Structure Parsing Starter
description: Parse a small crystal-structure file with pymatgen and summarize composition, lattice, density, and symmetry metadata.

name: STRING Interaction Partners Starter
description: Query the official STRING API for high-confidence interaction partners and summarize the evidence-backed partner list in JSON.

name: SciPy ODE Simulation Starter
description: Integrate a deterministic Lotka-Volterra ODE system with SciPy `solve_ivp` and summarize the trajectory in compact JSON.

name: GBIF Species Occurrence Search Starter
description: Resolve a GBIF species match and fetch a compact live occurrence sample suitable for biodiversity discovery and species-distribution workflows.

name: NiBabel NIfTI Summary Starter
description: Generate or load a small NIfTI image with NiBabel and summarize shape, affine, zoom, and unit metadata.

name: Astropy FITS Image Summary Starter
description: Generate or load a tiny FITS image with Astropy and summarize signal statistics plus basic header fields.

name: PlantCV Plant Phenotyping Starter
description: Generate a synthetic plant image, segment it with PlantCV, and summarize simple mask-based phenotyping measurements.

name: Opentrons Liquid-Handling Protocol Starter
description: Render a minimal Opentrons Protocol API transfer script and verify it through the local simulator.

name: GBIF Dataset Search Starter
description: Search GBIF dataset metadata with a free-text query and summarize a compact biodiversity-dataset result set.

name: scikit-bio Tree Comparison Starter
description: Parse two toy phylogenetic trees with scikit-bio and summarize topology-comparison metrics such as Robinson-Foulds distance.

name: MNE EEG Preprocessing Starter
description: Create a synthetic EEG RawArray with MNE-Python, apply a simple band-pass filter, and summarize the preprocessing effect.

name: Nilearn fMRI Denoising Starter
description: Build toy fMRI-like timeseries with nuisance confounds and summarize the effect of Nilearn confound cleaning.

name: FiPy Diffusion PDE Starter
description: Solve a tiny 1D diffusion PDE with FiPy and summarize the evolved profile plus mass conservation.

name: FastQC MultiQC Read QC Starter
description: Run FastQC and MultiQC on a tiny FASTQ input and summarize core read-QC metrics plus report outputs.

name: MACS3 Peak Calling Starter
description: Run MACS3 callpeak on a toy BED file with a deterministic no-model configuration and summarize the strongest peak.

name: Fairlearn Bias Audit Starter
description: Run Fairlearn group metrics on a deterministic toy cohort and summarize threshold-based fairness audit flags.

name: MNE Connectivity Graph Starter
description: Create deterministic toy EEG epochs, compute alpha-band coherence with MNE-Connectivity, and summarize a thresholded graph.

name: UniProt Sequence Feature Annotation Starter
description: Fetch a UniProt entry such as P04637 and summarize sequence-feature counts plus representative annotated sites.

name: Zarr Chunked Array Store Starter
description: Write a tiny numeric matrix to a chunked compressed Zarr store and summarize its layout and statistics.

name: Papermill Parameterized Notebook Starter
description: Execute a tiny parameterized notebook with Papermill and summarize the injected parameters plus final result payload.

name: GitHub Actions Scientific CI Starter
description: Render a repository-aware GitHub Actions workflow that runs validation, site generation, tests, and targeted smoke commands.

name: OpenMM Langevin Dynamics Starter
description: Run a deterministic toy Langevin dynamics simulation in OpenMM and summarize the recorded bond-length and potential-energy frames.

name: Optuna Bayesian Optimization Starter
description: Optimize a small synthetic objective with Optuna's TPE sampler and summarize the best trial plus ranked trial table.

name: Frictionless Tabular Validation Starter
description: Validate a small CSV against a Frictionless schema and emit a compact structured error report.

name: RO-Crate Metadata Bundle Starter
description: Package a tiny local dataset into an RO-Crate directory and summarize the generated metadata graph.

name: minimap2 Read Mapping Starter
description: Align a tiny FASTQ example with minimap2, sort and index the BAM, and summarize the resulting alignments.

name: QCoDeS Parameter Sweep Starter
description: Record a tiny deterministic QCoDeS parameter sweep into a local dataset database and summarize the captured run.

name: Chaospy Uncertainty Propagation Starter
description: Propagate uncertainty through a small deterministic toy response model with Chaospy quadrature and summarize the output distribution.

name: Inspect Evaluation Harness Starter
description: Run a deterministic local Inspect benchmark that compares a candidate solver against a weaker baseline on toy scientific-agent cases.

name: Autoprotocol Experiment Plan Starter
description: Generate a machine-readable Autoprotocol plan from a tiny transfer table and summarize the resulting refs and instructions.

name: Dash Scientific Dashboard Starter
description: Build a deterministic Dash dashboard scaffold from toy measurements and summarize the layout, callback map, and preview artifacts.

name: OpenAlex Citation Chain Starter
description: Resolve a seed paper through OpenAlex and summarize a small upstream/downstream citation chain in structured JSON.

name: Reactome Pathway Analysis Starter
description: Submit a short identifier list to the Reactome Analysis Service and keep a compact ranked pathway summary for downstream use.

name: NetworkX Network Propagation Starter
description: Run deterministic personalized PageRank from a small seed set over a weighted interaction graph and summarize the top propagated nodes.

name: RDKit Conformer Generation Starter
description: Generate a small deterministic conformer ensemble with RDKit ETKDG and summarize ranked UFF energies.

name: OpenMM Force-Field Assignment Starter
description: Assign a simple water force field to a tiny PDB topology with OpenMM and summarize the resulting system.

name: numcodecs Compression / Decompression Starter
description: Round-trip a tiny integer matrix through a deterministic numcodecs compressor and summarize the encoded payload.

name: PyArrow Format Conversion Starter
description: Convert a tiny tabular input into Parquet with PyArrow and keep a deterministic schema plus round-trip summary.

name: SciPy Statistical Testing Starter
description: Run deterministic Welch and Mann-Whitney tests over two toy groups and summarize the effect direction plus p-values.

name: UMAP Dimensionality Reduction Starter
description: Embed a tiny labeled feature matrix with UMAP and summarize the resulting 2D geometry for downstream plotting.

name: pyDOE3 Experimental Design Starter
description: Generate a tiny full-factorial experiment design from bounded factor definitions and summarize the resulting rows.

name: ASE Geometry Optimization Starter
description: Optimize a tiny argon dimer with ASE BFGS plus a Lennard-Jones calculator and summarize the resulting geometry.

name: RapidFuzz Skill Deduplication Starter
description: Score a tiny skill inventory with RapidFuzz and surface likely duplicate names above a configurable threshold.

name: datasketch Resource Deduplication Starter
description: Use MinHash LSH over a tiny resource sample to surface likely duplicate registry entries and summarize the candidate pairs.

name: MkDocs Summary Catalog Starter
description: Build a tiny static catalog site with MkDocs from a JSON page specification and summarize the generated HTML output.

name: DeepChem MolGraph Featurization
description: Starter skill for deepchem molgraph featurization.

description: Starter skill for metadata harmonization starter.

description: Starter skill for synthetic toy dataset generator starter.

description: Starter skill for cooler hi-c matrix summary starter.

description: Starter skill for bcftools variant filtering starter.

name: Benchmark Table Mining Starter
description: Extract leaderboard rows from local markdown benchmark notes, including broader multi-table Papers-with-Code-style summaries.
